app.title: Show HN: I built a social media management tool in 3 weeks with Claude and Codex
app.author: JanSchu
app.description: Built social media management tool in 3 weeks using Claude and Codex
proposed_tests: Run a sample social media campaign and measure execution time
Test the tool on 5 sample social media accounts and verify data accuracy
Compare against existing social media management tools
